heading: Intervention by Attorney General
label: 1709 Intervention by Attorney General
text: Whenever a civil action is instituted under by an individual, the Attorney General may intervene in such action upon timely application.section 1706 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective on and after sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 21, 1974section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380section 1221–1 of this title
